title: Entity Relationship Page with Abstracted CSS
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to navigate to a dedicated Entity Relationship page from the SELECT page, so that I can view entity diagrams in a clean, standalone layout.
description:
## Context
The ERD visualization was embedded in existing pages. Users need a dedicated route to access it cleanly.

## Behavior
A new page is created at `/entity-diagram` that includes all elements from the SELECT page plus the ERD visualization. CSS is abstracted so the page uses shared styles rather than inline or page-specific styling.

## Navigation
A navigation link is added to the SELECT.php page pointing to the new entity diagram route.
acceptance_criteria: A dedicated /entity-diagram route is accessible from the SELECT page
The page includes the ERD visualization and relevant elements from SELECT
CSS is abstracted into shared stylesheets rather than inline styles
Navigation link is visible and functional from the SELECT page
ux_changes: New dedicated Entity Relationship page at /entity-diagram with navigation link from the SELECT page. Shared CSS styling applied.
middleware_changes: New route handler and page template for the /entity-diagram endpoint, incorporating elements from SELECT.php.
implementation_notes: Page abstracts CSS into shared styles to maintain consistency across the app. The entity-diagram route serves the GoJS-powered ERD built in MBT-89.
